name: Holland Bus Svc LLC
districts_or_customers: Blue Bird dealer for State of Michigan; also Arboc, Blue Bird Commercial, Micro Bird Commercial; sells to schools/commercial fleets
recent_news: Completed dealership expansion (~9 acres) circa 2019 to support increased demand; longstanding Blue Bird dealer in MI.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. Holland Bus Company is a Blue Bird school-bus DEALER (sales/parts/service), not a contract operator that transports students for districts. Out of scope for Summit acquisition strategy.

name: Visser Bus Svc
principals: Brad Visser (Owner per source list; not confirmed on website)
fleet_size_est: small (single-tier; ~25-50 buses inferred from 35 employees and mix of 84-pax transit, 25-pax school buses, WC-accessible)
districts_or_customers: Cucamonga School District (Bus Transportation Pilot Program partner, 2024-25); broader Inland Empire schools and organizations
recent_news: Partnered with Cucamonga School District on a free Bus Transportation Pilot Program for eligible students (2024-2025 school year; portal closed Aug 2025).
fit_notes: Legitimate independent family-owned CA school-bus operator with 45+ year history and active district contract (Cucamonga SD pilot). Small scale (~35 employees) makes it a sub-scale tuck-in for Summit's Inland Empire/SoCal footprint; succession potential given founder-era ownership.

name: Gold Coast Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: unknown (no Memphis-Shelby County Schools contract reference found; SCS uses its own fleet plus a few named contractors, none matching this name)
recent_news: None located. Website goldcoastbiz.com does not resolve; no business directory, news, FMCSA, or chamber listing surfaced for a 'Gold Coast Bus' school operator at 3426 S Perkins Rd, Memphis 38118.
fit_notes: Cannot verify this is an operating school-bus contractor. Likely a stale record, defunct entity, or mislabeled business (the 3426 S Perkins area is a mixed commercial corridor). Recommend deprioritizing pending phone/state-corp-registry verification before any outreach.

name: Sammi Daewoo Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: None identified. Boulder Valley School District runs its own transportation and partners with RTD; no contractor by this name appears.
recent_news: Name 'Sammi Daewoo Bus Service' historically refers to a South Korean / Pakistani express coach business (Sammi acquired Daewoo Bus in 2004, sold 2011, became Daewoo Express) - unrelated to Boulder, CO. The listed website (station10creative.com) is a creative-agency domain, not a bus operator. LinkedIn page for 'SAMMI DAEWOO BUS SERVICE' is tagged IT services in Lahore, Pakistan.
fit_notes: Almost certainly a bad data record - no Boulder, CO school-bus operator by this name exists. NOT a tuck-in target. Recommend dropping from pipeline.

name: National Charter Bus Jackson
owner_or_parent: National Charter Bus / nationalbuscharter.com (national charter-bus brokerage network covering 50+ U.S. cities)
principals: n/a (corporate brokerage; not a locally owned operator)
fleet_size_est: n/a (does not own/operate a Jackson, MS fleet)
districts_or_customers: Markets to Jackson Public Schools, Jackson State University, Ole Miss, Mississippi State field-trip/event groups - via referrals to subcontracted motorcoach operators
recent_news: None as a Jackson operator; the 'Jackson' page is a city landing page for National Charter Bus's nationwide reservation network.
fit_notes: NOT a tuck-in target. This is a city landing page for the National Charter Bus national reservation/brokerage platform - not an independent Jackson-based school-bus contractor with its own fleet, drivers, or district contracts. Address ('Downtown, Jackson') and phone ('Not Available') are consistent with a virtual presence. Drop from pipeline.
